description: Eager-import lib/followup-writer.js at compose MCP startup (instead of lazily on first propose_followup call) so a genuine module-skew / missing-export break fails fast at server boot rather than surfacing only when a user first calls the tool.

completions.notes: Eager-preload lib/followup-writer.js at MCP boot (fail-fast on missing module/export). preloadEagerModules() asserts the expected export is a function (await import() doesn't throw on a missing named export); wired before server.connect() with writeSync(2,...)+exit(1) and a COMPOSE_PRELOAD_PROBE env seam. toolProposeFollowup unchanged (cache hit, zero behavior change). 3-round Codex design review + 2-round impl review all CLEAN; full suite green (4140 node + 485 ui + 100 tracker).
